en.value:
Stakeholder workshop/coordination meeting, project lunching etc.
            
        
        
            
            Identification of new areas, and production pockets and Baseline survey in new districts
            
        
        
            
            Preparation of training manuals and materials 
            
        
        
            
            Social Mobilization (Group formation, management meeting training, counseling etc)
            
        
        
            
            Skill development trainings ( seed production technology, quality control, marketing, etc)
            
        
        
            
            Refresher training for existing farmer groups and project staff (as required ) on new production and marketing technologies
            
        
        
            
            Support to new farmers group for plant protection tools and inputs supplies (sprayer, watercane, plastic sheet etc.)
            
        
        
            
            Induction/orientation and Trainer’s Training (ToT) to staff (central & district level)
            
        
        
            
            Planning of source seed production with concerned partners and stakeholders
            
        
        
            
            Support construction and rehabilitation of micro-irrigation schemes
            
        
        
            
            Support to cooperative for source seed production and management
            
        
        
            
            Agri-inputs support and intensive coaching to DAG and women farmers
            
        
        
            
            Complementary multiple income generating activities with SDC supported and other projects for connected development (as needed)
            
        
        
            
            Promotion of project produced seed in commercial vegetable production pocket/areas
            
        
        
            
            Pilot production of hybrid seed of tomato 
            
        
        
            
            Seed health heating testing processing equipment and materials for seed testing laboratory
            
        
        
            
            Annual learning /experience sharing and interactive workshop of project staff
            
        
        
            
            Gender sensitization mass meeting to aware DAGs and women farmers (District/pocket)
            
        
        
            
            Interactive planning workshop among entrepreneurs, cooperatives and line agencies (for demand based seed production and to facilitate contract agreement at cluster level)
            
        
        
            
            Support to construct and furnish seed collection centers/cooperatives and storages
            
        
        
            
            Organization of National Seed Conference for seed system development
            
        
        
            
            Formation & registration of new seed production and marketing cooperatives
            
        
        
            
            Strengthening & support to existing & new seed production and marketing cooperatives material support and training (as per need)
            
        
        
            
            Formation of federated central/district union of seed production and marketing cooperatives
            
        
        
            
            Study tour and visits for farmers, cooperative members and local agro-vets on marketing (in-country)
            
        
        
            
            Capacity building training to new cooperative members (business plan, account keeping , leadership development etc. )
            
        
        
            
            Support for seed field inspection at critical stages by licensee for internal quality assurance
            
        
        
            
            Training to cooperative technicians and staff on internal seed quality assurance procedures
            
        
        
            
            Support to cooperative technicians and staff to apply internal quality assurance (travel & logistic)
            
        
        
            
            Support on packaging, branding, labeling and materials to co-operatives and entrepreneurs
            
        
        
            
            Organize value chain actors meeting in each cluster
            
        
        
            
            Support to SEAN for seed market information study for analyzing demand, supply, and import export situation
            
        
        
            
            Market Information Collection (domestic)
            
        
        
            
            Conduction of periodic socio-economic study in the project areas to analyze the pr
